list.txt: - Todo muy bien!
- 最高の滞在場所でした ベッドからサグラダファミリアが見れて、レストランも近く、清潔で最高でした

- Todo excelente el depto impecable !!!limpieza y calidaf de los artefactos electricos nos fueronnmuy utiles. La zona tranquila, cerca de un super mercado y a pocos km de todo nos manejamos caminando.

- Very nice condo next to Sagrada Familia. I could see the towers of the church from my bed. The view was spectacular and will be even better when the front entrance to the church is finished. There are two huge balconies with the view, you could spent hours looking at Sagrada Familia, on one of them. The kitchen was small and adequate for making breakfast. We did not cook dinners. The area is not the greatest when it comes to good restaurants. Realistically, you have to take metro or a bus to go to interesting restaurants and bars. Metro is 400 meters away.
- I had a really nice stay, the place was as described and communication always on point. Will come back if in Barcelona, and recommend if you plan to visit Park Guell as is very near!
- Me encantó el alojamiento todo estuvo bien la comunicación con los anfitriones fue 10 volvería con gusto y lo recomiendo
- Excelente lugar cumple con la descripción y la ubicación es muy buena, lugar tranquilo con restaurante, tiendas y metro cerca. Superó las expectativas
- Was a beautiful stay. Spacious and as described - the view!!! Thanks for having us!xx

- Gerardo’s place was exactly like on the pictures. At the heart of the city, few steps from Sagrada Familia and really close to other places. Place was really clean. We had what we needed. Only minor issue was Wifi wasnt working properly. Besides that it ws great!
- Divino, cómodo y súper limpio, con vistas increíbles a la Sagrada Familia, la atención del Host 24/7 y súper amable, volvería sin duda ❤️
- We loved this attic apartment! Super stylish and it had everything we needed. The outside spaces are perfect and …WOW, what a view!! We would def recommend and we will be back! ❤️

- Disfrutamos mucho de nuestra estadía, el apartamento super agradable y muy limpio, tiene todo lo necesario para que te sientas bien, queda una estación del metro cerca que te ayuda a llegar sitios mas turisticos como el centro, o la plaza de catalunya. La respuesta a tus inquietudes es super rápida también por parte de ellos.
- Very responsive host, check in was easy, place was clean and very convenient location. Would easily recommend!
- Great location
- Ottima posizione, check in e check out estremamente semplice e comodi
- Superbe logement, emplacement au top à coté de tout et propreté irréprochable. Le propriétaire s'assure que tout se passe bien durant le séjour et est au petit soin, je recommande !!

- Me encantó el Departamento coincidía con las fotos al cien por ciento, muy fácil acceso y sobre todo que fueron muy flexibles con la hora de llegada y salida, lo recomiendo mucho y en definitiva vuelvo a hospedarme con ellos

- El apartamento estaba perfecto, bien comunicado, zona tranquila, bueno sitios para comer, el metro cerca y autobús también. La casa estaba limpia y el anfitrión nos facilito tanto la llegada como la salida.

- This apartment is perfect to come visit the area. Right by Sagrada Familia but also quiet for sleep being on the top floor. Elevator in building makes bags not a problem at all. Very clean and the balconies were lovely. Gerardo was very helpful during the stay!

- Lindo lugar , tranquilo pero con conexiones hacia lugares de interes El depto estaba muy bien , el sillon deberian cambiarlo , bastante incomodo y vencido El resto en buenas condiciones Gerardo fue muy atento , tuvimos un inconveniente cuando ingresamos la red de wifi que nos indicaron no era , pero lo solucionaron rapidamente Tiene mercados y lugares para comer muy cercanos , nos gusto el lugar
- super fin og ren lejlighed i rolige omgivelser. 😊 -eneste minus var sengen som var alt for blød
- The location was perfect and the apartment a delight! Gerardo was very attentive! Would definitely stay here again!

- En general, estuvo muy limpio, la ubicación me pareció adecuada fácil de trasladarse. Tuve inconveniente con el wifi por no localizar la clave pero no fue gran detalle. El apartamento luce como en las fotos. Recomiendo.
- excelente lugar muy recomendado.. buena ubicación

- We loved our stay. Very happy overall. A couple of minor areas for improvement, and I am being picky…. Better quality pillows and a few more of them (one per bed is a bit skimpy) would make the comfortable beds perfection. We also needed some kitchen linens. Adding a dish towel and dishwashing cloth would be an improvement. These were minor issues and certainly wouldn’t stop me from staying here again.

- 숙소에서 보이는 사그라다 파밀리아 하나로 모든게 완벽해지는 곳이었다! 😍 사그라다 파밀리아까지 도보 5분 거리였고 주변에 식당, 카페, 마트 등이 충분히 있고 지하철 L2, L5와도 가까워서(도보 5분) 3박 4일 동안 편하게 지내고 이동할 수 있었다. 깨끗한 침구, 2개의 테라스, 구성이 알찬 주방시설, 따뜻하고 아늑한 온도 모든 게 완벽!!! 문제가 생기면 즉각 적극적으로 대처하고 해결해주는 호스팅에도 감동♡ 다음에 바르셀로나에 또 오게 된다면 무조건 여기!!!!

- Todo me encantó. El apartamento es muy tranquilo, limpio y acogedor, perfecto para descansar. Tiene dos terrazas maravillosas; una de ellas con una vista absolutamente increíble a la Sagrada Familia, algo realmente especial. La estancia fue muy cómoda y agradable. Sin duda, lo recomiendo y me encantaría volver.

- 숙소가 깔끔하고 예뻐요. 요리를 좋아한다면 최적의 숙소일 것입니다 ☺️ 세제는 하나씩만 제공되니, 장기간 머물 경우 추가 세제를 챙겨오길 추천합니다. 수건의 경우, 제공된 수건을 빨아서 사용해야하며, 비가 많이 오면 저녁에 뜨거운 물이 잘 나오지 않았습니다. 숙소가 상당히 높은 언덕에 있어 짐이 많다면 이동 시 힘들 수 있습니다. 호스트의 답장이 매우 빨라 편안했습니다.

- The flat is really nice, it is bigger than it looks in the pictures. Everything was working well. Easy to find, near to public transport. I had a great stay at this lovely flat. I felt like home. Totally recommended.
- Fabulous apartment in a really great area. Views to die for and in warmer months, the terraces would be fabulous. Great communication before and throughout the stay.
- Apartamento precioso, muy bien ubicado !!! He pasado mi estancia genial ☺️
- Bien situé, quartier sécuritaire, près des commodités. Avons apprécié notre séjour.

- Excellent accommodation, as described, beds comfortable, quiet and a well situated location. On our second day there was an issue with the door. Which was dealt with in a matter of minutes which then led to lots of recommendations! Had a great stay with friends and we were all really happy with the accommodation and location, which was a relief as I’d booked it!
- Tvarkingas butas, aiškios atvykimo, išvykimo instrukcijos.
- ottima esperienza, consigliato

- Lovely apartment in a good location with a very helpful and responsive host who was constantly checking in with us. The apartment was just as listed and was spotless, with access to lovely restaurants and all the attractions nearby, would love to come back!
- Odporúčam, s bývaním som bola spokojná.
- Perfect localization- close to metro station. Quiet, peacefull apartment near to one of Gaudi’s willa. Really good communication with host.

- The apartment was lovely and clean, well decorated and had everything we needed for a short break. The location was amazing; just around the corner from the Sagrada Família and the metro station. We would definitely stay there again.

- Vi var meget tilfredse med lejligheden. Vi ankom til Barcelona lidt tidligere end beregnet og før tjekin tidspunktet, men fik lov til at komme ind i lejligheden lidt før tid. Det var en virkelig god service. Vi kunne godt lide at den lå et sted med en smule ro, men at man på 5 min. kunne gå ned til et hyggeligt sted og spise morgenmad og finde en metro til dagens eventyr. Lejligheden havde alt hvad vi havde behov for og alt var rent og pænt. Helt klart en lejlighed vi kunne finde på at leje igen

- We had a wonderful stay and truly enjoyed everything about the apartment. The hosts thoughtfully provided a baby crib even though we hadn’t requested one, which was such a lovely surprise and greatly appreciated. There was also an extra set of bed linen for the sofa, which made our stay even more comfortable. The apartment was well-prepared, convenient, and had everything we needed. We would happily stay here again and highly recommend it to other guests.
- it's a perfect place to stay for a quiet and calm stance.
- Wonderful place, beautiful and spacious, extremely clean, amazing location with lots of great restaurants as well as close to a transportation!
- Convenient location, bright apartment with two spacious balconies with great views, and professional management team. Highly recommended!

- It’s really a nice apartment to stay with two big terraces and clean and soft bed and sofa, with nice coffee capsules and bright view of Sagrada Família so close. You can have convenient transportation to the metro about 5 minutes at Sagrada Família station. I really enjoyed the room staying time.

- Gerardo was a great host, he is one of the most responsive hosts that I've had on Airbnb. He ensured that we had everything that we needed during our stay, including plenty of extra towels and linens. We enjoyed this location very much, particularly having a supermarket down the street and a metro stop within a 10 minute walk.
- Great space and great location. Easy to access the train station and taxis to commute all around Barcelona.

- We stayed in Barcelona at Gerardo's place for a couple of weeks - me, my wife alongside my parents. Very nice apartment, great communication with the host, a really cosy, tidy, clean and high quality place to stay at. When we had any sort of issues, the host responded really fast and provided us with clear instructions. If we go to Barcelona again, we will definitely choose the same accomodation. Thanks for everything!
- It has been a wonderful staying in your place! Thank you!

- O espaço é amplo, muito organizado. Nem preciso falar da localização, praticamente do lado da Sagrada Família. A comunicação foi otima e com instruções claras. O app para a entrada é muito eficiente. Respostas rápidas do anfitrião. Super recomendo!

- The apartment is exactly as pictured and almost felt like a true home. The bed is very comfortable, making it easy to relax after a day out. The location is excellent—close to metro stations, which made getting around the city super convenient. The host was wonderful—friendly, attentive, and always quick to respond to any of our needs. Would definitely recommend staying here!
- Logement propre et sécurisé
- nice location ，good quality
- O espaço estava ótimo, como descreve no anúncio. Fácil acesso e com uma estação de metro a uns 5 minutos a pé. Valeu muito apena.
- Buen apartamento en buenas condiciones, bien situado en el barrio de Gracia y bien comunicado con el metro a 2 minutos de la puerta.

- We had a great stay. Fantastic check-in and out without a hitch. The apartment is in a great location, with access to public transportation - although we preferred to walk everywhere :-). The building has an elevator which was welcome after a day of 20,000+ steps. The apartment is modern and was exactly what we were looking for. Close by were plenty of cafes restaurants for breakfast/brunch and dinner. We would most definitely come back and stay again on our next visit.
- El apartamento tiene de todo, es exactamente como se ve en las figuras. También muy bien ubicado, todo bien, gracias!
- Everything was ok, very convinent way to check in. Apartment was clean and comfortable
- idelament situe a 1 coin de rue d'une station de metro et de Sagrada Familia. Epicerie et pharmacie en face de l'apart. Vue incroyable sur Sagrada Familla. Beau quartier.
- Le logement est très agréable et spacieux. il est à deux pas du métro et permet de profiter pleinement de Barcelone.

- Unser Aufenthalt bei Urban Flats Barcelona war einfach perfekt! Die Wohnung war modern, stilvoll eingerichtet und sehr sauber. Man merkt sofort, dass hier viel Wert auf Details und Komfort gelegt wird. Die Lage ist ideal – zentral und trotzdem ruhig, sodass man die Stadt entspannt erkunden kann. Öffentliche Verkehrsmittel, Restaurants und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten sind schnell erreichbar. Der Check-in verlief unkompliziert und das Team war jederzeit freundlich, hilfsbereit und professionell. Bei Fragen wurde sofort reagiert – wirklich top Service! Wir haben uns vom ersten Moment an wie zu Hause gefühlt und würden jederzeit wiederkommen. Klare Weiterempfehlung für alle, die Barcelona komfortabel und entspannt genießen möchten!
- Sehr professionelle Abwicklung. Die Lage ist absolut perfekt. Die Aussicht auf die Sagrada ist atemberaubend. Alles in allem eine schöne Wohnung.
- Recommended. Felt there are little amount of kitchen amenities, but once I notified the host, it was sorted just few hours later. Great place exactly as described.
- Muy bien y muy limpio

- La estadía fue muy buena. La disposición, proactividad y comunicación de Gerardo estuvieron A1. El apartamento estuvo ordenado, limpio y fue exacto a como se vio en las fotos. Además, el lugar es muy tranquilo, sin ruido y con accesos sencillos a los diferentes puntos en Barcelona. Volvería nuevamente sin dudarlo.
- Everything was nice
- It was a great stay. The location was really good, so close to metro and calm. The host was really helpful and responsive. I would definitely recommend!
- ок
- Very clean and spacious. Bathrooms were perfect and kitchen had all utensils needed. Views were great on both balconies, we did not want to leave.

- We had a great stay! The hosts were very communicative and helpful throughout our visit. The location was excellent—situated in a nice area and very close to the metro, which made getting around the city really easy. The place also provided everything we needed during our stay. Overall, a very comfortable and convenient experience. Highly recommended!
- Everything perfect. Calm area. Good location and apartment.
- Estuvimos muy a gusto en depto, un único punto a reconsiderar es el tamaño del termotanque, el volumen de agua es para bañarse dos personas. El resto, EXCELENTE, incluido Gerardo.
- Aucune mauvaise surprise, l’appartement annoncé correspond en tous points à l’annonce.
- Muy buena ubicación a unos pasos de la Sagrada Familia, el departamento es espacioso.
- Amazing location and very communicative host
- great stay & location!

- An exceptional stay in the heart of Barcelona. Waking up to a direct view of the Sagrada Família from the bedroom is an experience that simply cannot be overstated. The property was immaculately maintained — spotless throughout, with comfortable beds and fresh linens that made every night's rest genuinely restorative. The location is ideal: surrounded by restaurants all within walking distance, the neighborhood feels immediately livable rather than touristy. We settled in effortlessly and moved through the city with ease from day one. We will absolutely return on our next visit to Barcelona. Highly recommended without reservation.
- Excelente alojamiento, a una cuadra de la sagrada familia con vista directa a la misma. Fácil check-in y buena comunicación por parte de los hosts. En general muy buena experiencia.

- logement idéalement placé à côté de la Sagrada família, pas loin du métro et des bus. Beaucoup de très bons restaurants alentours. Et une vue imprenable sur la Sagrada família ! Logement très propre et fonctionnel avec tous les équipements et commodités annoncés. équipe hyper réactive, disponible, à l'écoute et compréhensive. Bref super séjour, super expérience ! on recommande +++
- Super séjour. Appartement très agréable.
- Espaço muito bem equipado, limpo e bonito. A vista para a Sagrada Família é exatamente como na foto. O atendimento é excelente. Voltaria sem dúvidas.
- Very good location!

- My friends and I stayed here for a week and we had a wonderful time. You had a view of Sagrada Família on the back balcony. There was a washer and a drying rack for us to wash our clothes while we were there. The place was absolutely beautiful and there was an elevator, which was good for 3 girls lugging suitcases up to the 4th floor. It is a great place!

- Rezervasyondan itibaren konaklama tarihine kadar ilgilendiler. Herhangi bir soru olunca hızlıca dönüş yaptılar. Ayrıca evin konumu ve hijyeni de çok makuldu. Sagrada Familia’ya yürüme mesafesinde ve etrafında ihtiyacınız olan her şeyi bulabileceğiniz bir konum. Tekrardan yardımları için teşekkür ederiz.
- nice place nice view super clean super big
- 非常干净，距离圣家堂很近，很方便。

- We absolutely love staying here! The location was incredible and the home was nice and clean and quiet for when we wanted to come back in the evenings. I would definitely stay here again if I came back to Barcelona.

- Great apartment a stones throw away from the Sargrada Familia and a metro station. We walked from here to many other areas in Barcelona ranging from 30 mins to 45 mins walks but with plenty of cafes and bars to stop in along the way! There are 3 bedrooms, 2 are front facing over a busy road but to be expected in a city. I had read about this in previous reviews and took ear plugs which helped! One bedroom has an ensuite and there is another main bathroom. Kitchen was well equipped and the coffee machine and pods were a lovely touch. Plenty of shops close by to pick up some food shopping. The apartment was accessed via a link on our phones which was great and easy to use. We were a little bit early to check in which no problem and there was a case storage available when we checked out.
- 今回3泊4名で利用しました。 十分過ぎるほど広く快適に過ごすことができました。何と言っても、朝日を浴びたサグラダファミリア、夜ライトアップされたサグラダファミリアを贅沢にも部屋から眺めることが出来て最高でした。 素敵なバルセロナの旅となりました。ありがとうございまた。
- Excelente locations, very clean and spacious
- Great place to stay, very conveniently located!
- The place is beautiful and a great location in Barcelona! It is very walkable with beautiful views. Highly recommend this place to explore the city!

Premier location, great property! - Excellent location to explore and feel the center of Barcelona. The view on Sagrada Familia from the terrace is incredible: you can explore the intricate designs for hours, without having to jostle in the crowds of tourists on the ground. Plenty of cafes, restaurants and stores in the vicinity, easy access. Despite being just a block away from Sagrada Familia, the building itself is very quiet. Nothing really. The prices are higher than average all around, but it's to be expected near the major tourist attraction.

- Está muy bien cuidada, cómoda y limpia. El método de ingreso. No nos resultó cómodo y no lo conocíamos algo no anduvo bien y pudimos ingresar media hora más tarde. Luego todo bien. Hay un vecino que escucha la TV muy fuerte todo el día. El departamento es silencioso pero si abrís una ventana se escucha y fuerte.

Great location, wonderful apartment, elevator and a stellar view on the rear balcony! - Location & view! A few minor maintenance issues either weren’t previously reported, or weren’t fixed prior to our stay. And the second bedroom had no bedside lamps.
- All Everything was perfect and easy to fine Service and all the information was clear

大満足！ - スマホでのオートロックがとても便利でした。鍵を無くす心配もなく、操作も簡単でしたし、複数人で利用したので、それぞれが鍵の開け閉めをすることができてよかったです。また、念願のサグラダファミリアをお部屋から見ることができて最高でした！カトラリーや調理器具の充実、冷蔵庫も大きくて本当に使いやすかったです。自宅にいる様な居心地の良さ、3ベッドルームのお陰で、歯ぎしりを気にする友人も他の人に気兼ねなく眠れた様ですし、隣の部屋でも全く気にならなかったです。7泊したのですが、とてもリーズナブルで助かりました！ シャワールームはとても清潔でしたが、下水の臭いが気になりました。
- Totul Nimic
I would definitely choose this place again. - There are no comments available for this review

Excellent stay, the apartment is highly recommended for families. - Very clean apartament, well equipped in a modest but modern style, good location, check-in process fully automated and easy to complete. The windows from the two small bedrooms overlooked the shaft but it was not a surprise as the pictures were pretty clear about it.
Está a un paso de la Sagrada Familia, un lugar muy limpio, silencioso y amplio - Muy limpio, silencioso y amplio espacio
Clean, nice stay in Barcelona - The property was very clean and we felt safe. It’s well maintained and the staff was kind. Nothing

Grea stay would absolutely stay again. Thank you for the warm welcome!!! - Very big clean open space. Great location and super knowledgeable friendly staff. Judith is a sweet friendly and helpful person.
Fantastisch - Ruimte en ligging
- Top locatie Geluid bovenburen
Meraviglioso - La casa è stupenda e posizione perfetta

Divino apartamento y excelente ubicacion a una cuadra de la sagrada familia. - Ubicación excelente y el apartamento divino. Super completo y cómodo. Desde el living podes ver la sagrada familia, fabuloso. Que tengas que dejar un depósito con la tarjeta por posibles daños.

Consigliatissimo - Posizione, appartamento grande e top, benissimo per i gruppi di amici o famiglia (Casa Milà era il mio appartamento). Check in semplice, chiaro. Deposito cauzionale ok. Chiave direttamente sul telefono, si apriva velocemente e con una comodità unica. Vista su sagrada familia pazzesca.
- Excelente lugar , cómodo y cercano a Sagrada familia. El departamento nuevo como se ve en las fotos y fail acceso, solo recomendaría tener más almohadas en las camas.

Un bel appartement très bien situé. - Super emplacement, proche des commerces et surtout de la Segrada Familia. L’appartement est bien équipé, rénovation récente et de bon goût. Les explications pour l’accès au logement étaient claires, propriétaire disponible.
Very nice - Ease of coordination with the host. Na

A lovely clean and well maintained apartment in a great location for the Sagrada Família - We loved the location and the apartment was very clean. Communication with the managers of the property was very good. We could hear people in the apartment above although that said it didn’t keep us awake. A couple of small things; it would be handy to have a mirror in the bedroom and one with a plug next to it to make it easier to blow dry your hair. There also wasn’t a tea towel or oven gloves which would have been useful. As I say, very small things and they didn’t detract from the apartment.

Really great. Would stay again - Such a great apartment. Great view of the Sagrada Família, good location, close to metro stations. Was clean and very spacious. Would really recommend. Nothing was great!
Lovely apartment with incredible views of Sagrada Família - There are no comments available for this review

CONSIGLIATISSIMI E ORGANIZZATISSIMI - NON CERCATE ALTRO!! - il soggiorno in Spagna è stato per un'operazione e non per una vacanza. Per noi la scelta di questa struttura è stata casuale e se dovessimo ritornare lo faremmo sicuramente lì per la comprensione, professionalità e altissima disponibilità dimostrata da parte del team di Urban Flats. Il soggiorno doveva essere per fine gennaio per un'operazione in una struttura spagnola, ma a pochi giorni dalla partenza (dall'Italia), la struttura ci comunica che doveva essere spostata la data dell'operazione alla prima decade di marzo, questo ci ha messo molto in difficoltà avendo tutto pagato in anticipo. Secondo il contratto avremmo dovuto pagare una penale per disdetta (perdendo tutti i soldi) e pagare un'ulteriore permanenza nel mese di marzo. In tutto questo, il Team di Urban Flats ci ha risolto la situazione in poco tempo non mettendoci in difficoltà economica soprattutto, ma accogliendo e comprendendo le nostre difficoltà legate ad un'operazione fuori sede, ci hanno spostato la prenotazione senza farci pagare penale o ulteriori costi. Per noi è stata un'azione molto positiva e apprezzata. Inoltre si è verificata una rottura per più volte di un tubo d'acqua (uno alle 22.00) e immediatamente il team ha inviato il professionista per intervenire e sistemare il tutto. CONSIGLIAMO ASSOLUTAMENTE QUESTA STRUTTURA PER TANTE MOTIVAZIONI: PULIZIA, ORGANIZZAZIONE, IMMEDIATA RISPOSTA, PRESENZA COSTANTE E BUONA ORGANIZZAZIONE PER CHIAVE ONLINE, ELENCO DI LUOGHI PER MANGIARE, CENTRALITà.....E EMPATIA E COMPRENSIONE!! nulla!!
- It was a great stay at Urban Flats Vallirana. Location is perfect. Everything clean and comfortable. Thank you!
- Great location Great facilities Very cleanly Would stay again
Très bien - Appartement très propre et très bien équipé La distance du centre ville mais nous le savions en réservant

- Kommunikáció a tulajdonossal gyors volt, minden kérdésre rövid időn belül választ kaptunk. Megközelíthetőség, közel van a metró megálló. A környék biztonságos. A közelben élelmiszer bolt található. A lakásba a kódos bejutás egyértelmű volt. Nem volt ilyen.

- Das Appartement empfinde ich als sehr praktisch eingerichtet, gute Lage nicht weit von Metro und man ist überall schnell. Sauber, hell, die Größe absolut ausreichend und die die Gegend empfand ich auch als leicht zu erreichen. Jedenfalls auch ich könnte das Appartement nur weiter empfehlen. Ich habe nichts auszusetzen.
- Muy buen servicio!!
- Excellent location, staff was very quick to answer any questions that we had over WhatsApp. The couch is a bit uncomfortable
- The location is gorgeous! The communication with the owner was brilliant as well. Highly recommended

Nice place to stay - It’s really a nice apartment, everything worked properly, Wi-fi is perfect, calm outside and inside. All the messages were quickly answered by staff. Bus stop or metro station are in less than 10 min walk, supermarket in 2 min walk, restaurants are also nearby. We are totally satisfied thank you for the amazing service. It’s February, totally understandable, but if you’re asking, it was a bit chilly in the apartment.
Great place! - Very nice apartment in a great area. It was everything we needed. Good facilities and very clean. I would definitely stay here again!

Just great - Proximity to center, subway 5 minutes away, great neighbourhood, great value for the price Not a big deal, but there was a weird hissing sound coming from the maintenance room, maybe should be checked out
Minunat, fără stres. - Locație foarte bună, aproape de 2 stații de autobuz, una de metrou, magazine și restaurante în imediata apropiere. Foarte curat și utilat cu tot ce ai nevoie. -
Super apartament w dobrej lokalizacji (blisko stacji metra i przystanki autobusowe), w pobliżu liczne knajpki z dobrym j - There are no comments available for this review
- Zona y el apartamento muy amplio Precio se podría ajustar
A beautiful experience - The host is very reasonable and respects the guests, very kind.
- Clean and complete facilities. Odd setup for lift. Still requires going up or down short flight of stairs to use

Primo viaggio a Barcellona agevolato dalla location e dalla comodità per i vari spostamenti. - Appartamento molto comodo alla fermata Vallcarca della metro e vicino al Parc Guell. Nei dintorni si possono trovare facilmente supermercati e negozi di prima necessità. Foto e descrizione rispondono alla realtà. Molto agevole anche check-in online e gestione per l'accesso. Unico appunto negativo forse la chiusura delle finestre che però non possono dare nessun accesso ad estranei.
Séjour en famille pour visite Sagrada guell batlo - Tout, l emplacement idéal, communication au top. Kit de bienvenue appréciable Propreté, accessibilité Bien insonorisé Rien

Mieszkanie w super lokalizacji, w sam raz jak na krótki pobyt - Mieszkanie jest fajne, ładnie urządzone. Widok na 1 stronę - górę Tibidabo widać doskonale. Blisko do metra oraz Parku Guel - można dojść pieszo. Bardzo podobała mi się troska o higienę i czystość - dostaliśmy zapakowany zmywak, ściereczkę, płyn, kapsułkę do pralki i zmywarki. Dostępny był pakiet z oliwą, octem i solą. Gospodarz szybko odpowiadał (miałam problem ze zlokalizowaniem kodu do drzwi). Ten system do odbioru kluczy - nie jest to intuicyjna aplikacja, ale to kwestia aplikacji, a nie gospodarza.
Great aparmtent, easy access to metro to visit the city - Great location + clean and tidy

- Appartamento e posizione La distanza del deposito bagagli dall'appartamento e il fatto che quando siamo tornati a prenderlo abbiamo trovato il negozio chiuso e abbiamo aspettato più di mezz'ora prima che qualcuno ci aprisse perdendo il taxi

- 첫날 저녁 10시 전기가 고장이 나서 연락을 취하였으나, 여러 차례 연락을 취하였으나 연락이 되지 않음. 밤새 걱정이 되어 잠을 설치고, 불안함 마음이 너무 컸습니다. 다음날 오전 8시에 연락이 되어, 여러 차례 가이드 대로 조치를 하였으나 해결이 되지 않아, 수리 기사가 배정이 되어 9시반 도착... 오전 10시 넘어 수리가 됨. 수리가 되지 않으면, 다른 아파트로 옮길 수 도 있다는 안내를 받음.
- El apartamento es aceptable pero requiere mantenimiento. Llegamos y no estaba listo y tuvimos que esperar en la calle 90 min. La ubicación es buena.

- Insgesamt angenehmer Aufenthalt in toller Lage in Gràcia mit unkompliziertem Check-in und netter Kommunikation. Die Wohnung ist jedoch recht hellhörig und im Winter kühl; zum Heizen nutzt man die Klimaanlage, die die Luft sehr trocken macht. Die Küche ist eher spartanisch ausgestattet und nicht zum richtigen Kochen geeignet. Das Bad bleibt nach dem Duschen lange feucht, und die Matratze war für uns zu weich. Für den Preis dennoch okay – besonders für Reisende, die überwiegend draußen essen und die Wohnung vor allem als Basis nutzen.
- Amazing view of the Sagrada Família from the comfort of your bed. 2 balconies to enjoy the sunshine; great location, walkable: metro around the corner.
- N/A
- Very easy, nice check in

- Aside from a slight issue with gaining access to the digital key, our stay was wonderful. The location was great and the apartment was large, clean, and accommodating. The emergency helpline phone number was particularly helpful in resolving our issue swiftly.
- Tuvimos un aprovechamiento del tiempo excelente debido a la ubicación y una vista sorprendente. Si volvemos a Barcelona con gusto regresamos.

- Logement très propre et récemment rénové, nous avons apprécié la réactivité et la gentillesse de l’hôte. En revanche, l’appartement est assez sombre et surtout très bruyant, ce qui peut être compliqué avec un bébé. Merci toutefois pour le petit geste commercial apprécié suite à la gêne occasionnée.

- Great Location! A block from Sagrada Família and a short walk to the subway. Good restaurants nearby and about a little over a mile to La Rambla. The place is clean and spacious, but the walls are thin, so not good for light sleepers.

- el alojamiento fue estupendo, el único inconveniente es que el calentador de la ducha no funciona del todo bien. El agua caliente se corta a los 6/7 minutos de ducha y necesitas esperar unos 20 minutos a que se recargue. Por lo demás todo estupendo!!

- Appartement bien agencé et agréable à condition de ne pas y rester trop longtemps Pas de vue extérieur qui donne un sentiment d’oppression, heureusement nous étions en en balade du matin au soir La terrasse est enclavée entre 4 mur sans vue extérieures ce qui n’est pas précisé dans le descriptif Gros bémol les volet de la chambre ne se ferment pas correctement laissant passer la lumière tôt le matin Quand au volet du salon qui ne fonctionnait pas du tout laisse passer lumière et bruit en permanence . Info soit disant transmise mais aucune intervention ! La chambre du fin est très au calme , celle de la rue très bruyante Appart sympa pour quelques nuits mais pas plus
- No hay engaño, descripción correcta del piso. Poco contacto con anfitrión es una empresa y no es fácil la comunicación. Para la llave electrónica, hay que estar familiarizado con informática.
- Her şey guzeldi

- Die Unterkunft liegt in einem schönen Viertel und entspricht genau der Beschreibung/Bildern. Die Lage ist wirklich ideal – eine Bushaltestelle sowie zwei Metrostationen befinden sich in unmittelbarer Nähe, sodass man sehr flexibel unterweg ist. Es gibt auch schöne Cafes und Restaurants in nächster Nähe. Besonders toll ist auch die Nähe zu Casa Vicens von Gaudí und dem Park Güell, der in etwa 15 Minuten zu Fuß erreichbar ist. Da man gelegentlich Geräusche aus der Umgebung wahrnimmt, ist die Unterkunft für sehr lärmempfindliche Gäste eventuell nicht ideal.

Абсолютное несоответствие цены качеству - Хорошее расположение, недалеко от метро Апартаменты возможно когда-то раньше соответствовали рейтингу, но сейчас находятся в неухоженном состоянии. Оба кондиционера не работали, на одном вообще сорвана верхняя панель. В ванной комнате стойкий и очень неприятный запах канализации, который невозможно проветрить, сантехника с неисправностями. Кухонная утварь не укомплектована, расходные материалы в количестве 1 шт. Уборка халатная, на мягкой мебели пятна. Кровать очень неудобная. Звукоизоляция слабая, под окнами в узком переулке несколько мусорных баков, которые с жутким грохотом опорожняют мусорщики. Персонал на обращения реагирует формально: пришлите фото, пришлите видео, короче “все должно работать - ты кондиционер включить не можешь”, но проблемы никто решать не собирается - никто так и не появился. Такая же ситуация и с возвратом депозита, его пришлось неоднократно требовать, только жалоба в букинг.ком сработала - вернули на 10-й день. В общем крайне тягостное впечатление. Жаль, что невнимательно читал отрицательные отзывы - в них как раз истинные оценки. Думаю, что положительные пишут те, кого мучают с возвратом депозита, поскольку сразу после выезда получаешь письмо с настоятельной просьбой оценить проживание на 10 :) UPD Добавляю после ответа владельца. 40 лет путешествую, но такое встречаю впервые - чтобы явные проколы оспаривались сервисом. Систему характеризует не ошибка, а реакция на ошибку. Так вот судя по этой реакции эта система принципиально не способна и не собирается оказывать услуги заявленного качества. Я не буду опускаться до спора, пусть это останется на их совести. Я все-таки рекомендую этим "владельцам" все-таки посетить свой объект, где судя по всему они давно не были :)
- Schimmelgeruch

ASCOOOOO - La ubicación es excelente , el resto HORRIBLE , son estafadores !!! Me jodieron en 150 euros que dejé para cubrir algo que no explicaron y no me lo devolvieron !!! NO ME GUSTÓ NADA / VENTANAS QUE DABAN A PATIOS SUCIOS , un BALCÓN ASQUEROSO , edificio horrible , no se podía abrir ningún mueble porque aparecían cucarachas , ME ESTAFARON y encima me hicieron dejar un depósito de 150 que no me devolvieron cuando me iba !!!

Неприятный осадок, который запомнится надолго - Близко к станциям метро. Красивый вид из окна. Хороший ремонт БЫЛ лет 5 назад ( Опыт бронирования данных апартаментов привел нас с мужем к выводу, что такой вид жилья мы бронируем в последний раз! Мы забронировали квартиру на 1 ночь. С 16:00 до 11:00 (просьбы продлить время пребывания хоть на час были отклонены) из которых 8 часов мы спали за 78 евро! Прекрасная цена! НО! Нас попросили оплатить стоимость уборки в 90 евро!!!!! За фактически всего несколько часов пребывания в квартире! Итого стоимость составила 78 + 90 =168. Согласна, это нормальная цена для квартиры в Барселоне! Но не надо обманывать людей «скрытыми платежами» в виде уборки. Которая, кстати, не очень хорошего качества! Возле кровати я обнаружила липкие прозрачные пятна (на фото). Надеюсь, это ананасовый сок, а не биологическая жидкость! Далее, чтобы получить ключ от жилья (ровно в 16:00, ни минутой раньше), заплатите 150 евро депозита. В общем, в вечер бронирования настроение было испорчено полностью! По апартаментам. Ремонт не новый, есть следы от сильных сколов и потертостей. Было забронировано на 3 человек. Одеяла только 2.

- Everything in the apartment was worn out and needed repair or replacement… The air conditioner in the living room was very loud and vibrated a lot, and after turning it on, the split door came off and fell off! The split cover was already broken and was temporarily fixed in place with screws!! And they hadn't fixed it! We recorded a video and sent it to the relevant person to inform them. But they didn't do anything!! They just sent an apology message!! The dishwasher was also rusty and not suitable for use! The bathroom faucets were leaking water and instead of fixing it, they were packing towels!!

- Хорошее месторасположение Неудобное заселение, больше часа стояли перед апартаментами, тк приложение для открывания двери не работало. плохая клиентоориентированность, повезло, что через полтора часа кто-то вышел из офиса и открыл. Предоставили другие апартаменты, тк в брони были Casa Mila, а по факту предоставили соседние. Прошла неделя с момента визита и до сих пор не вернули депозит!

- Хорошее месторасположение Неудобное заселение, больше часа стояли перед апартаментами, тк приложение для открывания двери не работало. плохая клиентоориентированность, повезло, что через полтора часа кто-то вышел из офиса и открыл. Предоставили другие апартаменты, тк в брони были Casa Mila, а по факту предоставили соседние. Прошла неделя с момента визита и до сих пор не вернули депозит!

Wouldn’t stay again mainly due the poor bedding. - Good location, large living area, handy washing machine, useful kitchen cleaning materials Tiny bathrooms, small uncomfortable beds made worse with plastic mattress protectors, no ice cube containers

- La posizione fenomenale Purtroppo dalle finestre delle camere, che davano sulla corte interna, si sentiva il vicino con la TV accesa, mentre russava, mentre era in bagno. Non si potevano tenere le finestre aperte
- Good area, clean and comfortable place to stay The balcony does not lock which made us a bit uncomfortable to leave the facility without hiding stuff
睡的很好 - 面积很大 主卧床垫很舒服 窗景很小，阳台景色不太美好

- Aproape de mijloacele de transport în comun. Apartament curat și dotat cu cele necesare. Am avut parte de apă rece-călduță, iar încălzirea cu AC a apartamentului nu a fost foarte plăcută în zona livingului datorită zgomotului făcut de aparat, dar și pentru că nu făcea față cu dimensiunea spațiului.

Ha városnézés a terved, ez egy tökéletes szállás! - A szállásra bejutás egy appon keresztül történik. A szállásadó nagyon kedves és rugalmas volt. A lakás tágas, szép, modern. Az ágy kifejezetten kényelmes volt. A lakás elhelyezkedése is tökéletes. Nyugodt környék, de nagyon közel a tömegközlekedéshez. Csak légkondicionálóval lehet fűteni, és mivel kicsit hűvösebb volt amikor ott jártunk, így a padló elég hideg volt. A nappilaban található kanapé elég kényelmetlen.
Highly recommended! - location is convenient and quite! The property is modern.
Muy recomendable. - Aunque no fuera en persona, pero una buena atencion y preocupación por que todo esté bien. Nada, todo muy correcto.
- The owners were fantastic. Allways comunicating! Very Clean and with all comodoties
- Bardzo czysto, doskonała lokalizacja, wygodne łóżka,

Hezký byt s velmi dobrou polohou. - Bezproblémová komunikace, pohodový check in i check out, výborná poloha (klidná čtvrť i ulice, 5 min na metro, market 30m), čisté ubytování, velmi dobrá dostupnost z letiště. Byly k dispozici pouze 2 tablety do myčky, nebyla k dispozici utěrka na nádobí, k dispozici pouze 3 roličky toaletního papíru, příliš hlučná lednice pro člověka, který spí na pohovce, nepříliš ideální hluková izolace bytu (splachování, pes, hluk z ulice (naštěstí se jednalo o klidnou čtvrť)).

- Entrée autonome et avancée acceptée. Matelas très confortable. Quartier plutôt calme. Emplacement bien desservi par les transports en commun. Kit de cuisine de base offert. Supérette à quelques mètres.produits de toilette fournis. La cuisine est adaptée pour réchauffer uniquement : pas de passoire, pas de cloche pour micro onde, pas de petit couteau ni d'econome. On n'y trouve aucun reste de nourriture pouvant rendre service au suivant : herbes pour assaisonner, pâtes...Vis à vis avec les voisins (heureusement il y a des rideaux épais).

Comfortable, quiet stay in a great neighborhood in Barcelona. - This flat is in a great location for longer stays in Barcelona. It’s a short walk to Gracia and everything that neighborhood has to offer, but it’s on a relatively quiet street. Casa Vicens is a couple blocks away, and Park Guell is a 20-minute walk. The tiny square outside the building has a fruit and vegetable store and a cake shop, and there’s a grocery store about 200 meters away. The concierge staff were responsive and accommodating. When the dishwasher broke, they sent a technician to fix it. The couch kept falling apart and wasn’t comfortable. The kitchen was not well-stocked, especially for a long stay. I ended up buying a number of items from IKEA.

- Lokalizacja świetna, super okolica, metro blisko, 4 min piechotą do casa Vicens. Obok znajduje tajska restauracja z pysznym jedzeniem. Trochę ciemno w mieszkaniu, ale praktycznie tylko w nim spaliśmy.
Net appartement op prima locatie - Net en ruim appartement, echt op loopafstand van een metrostation.

An apartment that feels like home with a view of the Sagrada Familia - The location is perfect - in the Eixample district with a view of the Sagrada Familia. It was near a bakery, restaurants, the deli, a produce shop and the supermarket. The apartment is well-appointed and very clean. As we stayed for 6 nights, we had to purchase toilet paper (the provision was good for 2-3 days) which we did not mind at all. Sometimes, the noise from the street could be heard at night and early morning. Other than that, it was a very comfortable space.

The view alone is worth every penny - This is a beautiful apartment, which 2 balconies, of which one has a view of the beautiful Sagrada Familia. The apartment has an elevator, 2 bedrooms, an open kitchen and a cozy living room. It's perfect for a longer visit. The location is fantastic, with a lot of nice restaurants and bars in the vicinity. Public transport is close as well, in case you want to move around to other neighbourhoods.

- Lovely, comfortable apartment in a great location with fab view of the Sagrada Familia from the bed!, 2 terrraces; Quiet despite the proximity to the Sagrada and lots of good bars and restaurants nearby; Excellent communication from the team who are very responsive and keen that you have a good stay.

- The location was good -a lot of restaurants, bakeries, supermarkets. Good building and very clean. I recommend it In one of the bathrooms smell very disgusting. And in the inside bedroom the neighbours are talking all night very loud till 3.00 AM
Çok iyiydi, sadece ilk gittiğimizde adaireyi bulmakta zorlandık, kapıda yazmıyordu, bize belirtilmemişti, - Konumu, temizliği Ses geçiriyor
Location , location, location - Great location!! Easy to access. Spacious living room and kitchen area Double bed very small for 2 adults (6’3” & 6’ ). Luckily we had the extra twin bed to use

We had a fabulous family long weekend and the apartment really suited us - The location was perfect. Very central and right next to the metro. Open spaces locally for the dog and just 30 mins from the beach and harbour. Lots of bars and restaurants within walking distance and local supermarkets for essentials close by. It is a very busy area so if you are looking for a quiet escape this is possibly not for you. We drove and there was no on street parking but we did find a local garage to store the car for 4 days but it would have been easier if we could have at least parked outside to unload the car first.
- Me gustó el apartamento, lindo y cómodo. Cerca de la Sagrada Familia. Linda la zona. Cerca del resto para ir caminando. Lo único que tengo que decir es que el lavarropas afuera no es práctico.
- Everything was very good, from staff, location to clean state. Maybe the low quantity of dishes, but it is a nitpick.

- Entrée autonome et avancée acceptée. Matelas très confortable. Quartier plutôt calme. Emplacement bien desservi par les transports en commun. Kit de cuisine de base offert. - I can't change the arrival time since I arrived 30min ealier than expected but couldn't open the door. It was 5:30pm so out of the office hour so I called another 24h phone number, while it didn't get to be answered.
Muy recomendable. - Aunque no fuera en persona, pero una buena atencion y preocupación por que todo esté bien. Nada, todo muy correcto.
Highly recommended! - location is convenient and quite! The property is modern.

- Apartament bardzo przestronny i czysty, świetnie zorganizowany, z windą, położony ok. 10 minut od stacji metra, w pobliżu sklepy i knajpki w których można zrobić zakupy i zjeść do późna Wszystko było ok
Barcelone ! Trop beau séjour - Très bel appartement idéal pour visiter Barcelone Ras

We had a fabulous family long weekend and the apartment really suited us - The location was perfect. Very central and right next to the metro. Open spaces locally for the dog and just 30 mins from the beach and harbour. Lots of bars and restaurants within walking distance and local supermarkets for essentials close by. It is a very busy area so if you are looking for a quiet escape this is possibly not for you. We drove and there was no on street parking but we did find a local garage to store the car for 4 days but it would have been easier if we could have at least parked outside to unload the car first.
- Me gustó el apartamento, lindo y cómodo. Cerca de la Sagrada Familia. Linda la zona. Cerca del resto para ir caminando. Lo único que tengo que decir es que el lavarropas afuera no es práctico.
- Everything was very good, from staff, location to clean state. Maybe the low quantity of dishes, but it is a nitpick.

The view alone is worth every penny - This is a beautiful apartment, which 2 balconies, of which one has a view of the beautiful Sagrada Familia. The apartment has an elevator, 2 bedrooms, an open kitchen and a cozy living room. It's perfect for a longer visit. The location is fantastic, with a lot of nice restaurants and bars in the vicinity. Public transport is close as well, in case you want to move around to other neighbourhoods.

- Lovely, comfortable apartment in a great location with fab view of the Sagrada Familia from the bed!, 2 terrraces; Quiet despite the proximity to the Sagrada and lots of good bars and restaurants nearby; Excellent communication from the team who are very responsive and keen that you have a good stay.

An apartment that feels like home with a view of the Sagrada Familia - The location is perfect - in the Eixample district with a view of the Sagrada Familia. It was near a bakery, restaurants, the deli, a produce shop and the supermarket. The apartment is well-appointed and very clean. As we stayed for 6 nights, we had to purchase toilet paper (the provision was good for 2-3 days) which we did not mind at all. Sometimes, the noise from the street could be heard at night and early morning. Other than that, it was a very comfortable space.
Çok iyiydi, sadece ilk gittiğimizde adaireyi bulmakta zorlandık, kapıda yazmıyordu, bize belirtilmemişti, - Konumu, temizliği Ses geçiriyor

- The location was good -a lot of restaurants, bakeries, supermarkets. Good building and very clean. I recommend it In one of the bathrooms smell very disgusting. And in the inside bedroom the neighbours are talking all night very loud till 3.00 AM
Location , location, location - Great location!! Easy to access. Spacious living room and kitchen area Double bed very small for 2 adults (6’3” & 6’ ). Luckily we had the extra twin bed to use

Wunderbar, wir kommen gerne wieder 😃 - Sehr zentral, zu U-Bahn und zur Sagrada. Gute Ausstattung, super Kommunikation mit Vermieterin! Hat alles toll geklappt 👍🏻😃 Teilweise sehr hellhörig und zur Strasse eben auch Verkehrslärm. Ist halt Großstadt 🤷‍♀️
睡的很好 - 面积很大 主卧床垫很舒服 窗景很小，阳台景色不太美好

- La posizione fenomenale Purtroppo dalle finestre delle camere, che davano sulla corte interna, si sentiva il vicino con la TV accesa, mentre russava, mentre era in bagno. Non si potevano tenere le finestre aperte
- Good area, clean and comfortable place to stay The balcony does not lock which made us a bit uncomfortable to leave the facility without hiding stuff
Totalny brak WIFI - Lokalizacja Super. Każdego dnia można było obcować z Sagradą ;=-) W moim łózku i pod łóżkiem były żelki... Nie rozumiem tego... Czy tam było sprzątane?

Generally okay. - Access to city center by walking or train. Ground floor location was easy for moving big bags. Generally quiet and peaceful. Nearby small restaurants, grocery stores, and fruit shops. Uncomfortable pillows, no change in towels, no ledge for toiletries in shower area. Hot water ran out one late evening - but came back the following morning.

Locația foarte aproape de obiectivele turistice din Barcelona. - Locația foarte aproape de obiectivele turistice din Barcelona. Totodată, locația este aproape de metrou. Lângă apartament, găsești o farmacie și un magazin. Când am făcut rezervarea, în descriere apărea apartament cu 2 dormitoare și 2 băi. La fața locului, au fost 2 dormitoare dar o singură baie. În descriere apare acces la terasa de sus, ceea nu a fost posibilă. Am plătit pentru cazare extra, dar dacă am ajuns la cazare cu 10 minute nu am primit codul de acces mai repede.
- The place is nicely decorated The location is uphill and could be complicated sometimes to use public transport of you’re with elder people

Очікування та реальність - Близько до метро та парку Гуель, поряд розкішний район з віллами та Тібідабо. Є ліфт. Кондиціонери, що спасало взимку. Фото не передають реальний стан. Дуже гучні змішувачі води, звукоізоляція взагалі проблема. Кухню можна було б до комплектувати. Прибирання за 90€ зовсім ніяке.

Generally okay. - Access to city center by walking or train. Ground floor location was easy for moving big bags. Generally quiet and peaceful. Nearby small restaurants, grocery stores, and fruit shops. Uncomfortable pillows, no change in towels, no ledge for toiletries in shower area. Hot water ran out one late evening - but came back the following morning.

- La posizione è ottima: a pochi passi dalla metro e a soli 10 minuti dal centro e dalle principali attrazioni. La zona è tranquilla e residenziale, ma allo stesso tempo vicina al vivace quartiere di Gràcia, al Parc Güell e alla Sagrada Familia. Tutto molto confortevole qualche piccola pecca negli accessori del bagno ma di poco conto.

Clean apartment close to metro station - Very clean apartment, close to a metro station. Comfortable and well equipped. Perfect for a short stay and for families. All was fine, maybe a bit expensive for what it is.
- Posizione molto comoda vicino alla meteor ai servizi

- Location was good, literally 4 Metro stops from Casa Mila and Casa Batilo and 5 stops from La Rambla. Metro stop Valcarca is 4 minutes walking from the flat. There is small market right next to the building, Pharmacy and Bakery was 3 minutes by foot. Flat was clean and same as on pictures. Enough towels and linens. Building is on the beggining of a small hill where you need to go upwards for some 50-100 meters to reach it. You have escalator stairs in the next street but then you are going away from the building just to go back after. And that was a problem with small kid so just to be aware of this. Also, there is no heating in the apartment besides AC. One AC was working but not heating at all but the other did the job.

Chouette apparemment au calme et bien équipé - Bien sur tout rapport. Spacieux et aéré. Bonne literie et oreillers. Bonne isolation. Mauvais état du parquet à la sortie de la sdb, lampe de la table de nuit cassée. La douche un peu glissante. Attention avec la terrasse qui n'ouvre pas de l'extérieur : j'ai failli rester dehors. Système de fermeture de la porte - fenêtre de la terrasse à améliorer.

Great location - We loved the location of the apartment. It was easy to reach the main attractions in Barcelona, or get around by Metro or bus. There is a bus (#27) going to Sants Train station on top of the street, and this was very handy. The area is nice and very safe in the evening. Great churros on Carrer de GuillemTeil :) The flat is spacious and comfortable. There is a washing machine and a dryer in the utility room, and enough pods/tablets to get you going while you are there. Host responds very fast, although you never meet anyone. Check-in on the dot, as the access code to the building and the flat is not given in advance. I expected a balcony from the photos on booking.com, but the photos combine the different flats they have in the building. This was a bit confusing at first but not an issue. Although the double bed in the bedroom is very nice and comfortable, the sofa bed was not so great. The mattress could do with a fresh-up (stains of all kinds..), and it doesn't stay really stay horizontal when you lie down. Also there is a constant and quite loud noise in the kitchen ( from the hot water tank I think), and it was a bit annoying. Thankfully we were so tired at the end of the day, it did not affect the stay too much. Overall it was a great base to explore Barcelona.

В целом все очень понравилось. С удовольствием приедем сюда еще раз и порекомендуем знакомым. - Очень удобное расположение прямо возле парка Guell, также рядом была станция метро и несколько супермаркетов. Балкон выходил на тихую улицу. Удобные подушки и матрас, приятное постельное белье. На кухне много разной посуды, большой холодильник, кофеварка, тостер, чайник, посудомоечная и стиральная машинки. Втроем нам было очень комфортно в этих апартаментах. Не очень качественная уборка номера. Не было полотенец или салфеток на кухне. Также мы не смогли подбрать капсулы для кофеварки – купили 2 разных вида, ни один не подошел. Еще было бы хорошо дать инструкцию по сортировке мусора, т.к. в правилах проживания было написано, что нужно его вынести, когда будем выезжать.
- The location is great : 5mn walk to the metro station

Ezeket leszámítva a lakas elrendezése jó és a kiadó csapat rendes. - Fantasztikus helyen van Csodálatos kilátás :) Tágas lakás Nagyon kényelmetlen ágy (hatalmas göndör a közepén) Hajszál a zuhanyzóban, étkező alatt sok por, koszos kanapé és koszos kerti bútorok a teraszok burkolatai balesetveszélyesek Késői bejelentkezés
- Good location, responsive staff. Constant noise from renovations in neighbouring building.
- Location- size - excellent availability to contact agents Would have liked to have hangers for towels .

Super lokalizacja, wygodny apartament, głośno. - Lokalizacja, wygodne materace, dwie łazienki. Hałas. W pojedynczych pokojach okna wychodzą na jakieś małe podwórze, dźwiękowo to jak studnia. Przez trzy noce ciągle coś waliło za oknem. Słychać też głośne drzwi główne w apartamentach, jak ktoś wchodzi i wychodzi. Dla osób które mają problem ze snem i hałasem to ciężkie doświadczenie.
- Everything is great except the soundproofing soundproofing
Dobra lokalizacja, ale bez spokojnego snu w sypialni! - Lokalizacja na medal! Dokuczliwy hałas od strony ulicy w sypialni, wzmacniany przez nieszczelne okno, przy którym nie było możliwości spać.
Nice stay and excellent location - Location is superp Wifi doesn’t work well

lastPos.txt: - Great location Great facilities Very cleanly Would stay again

lastNeg.txt: Абсолютное несоответствие цены качеству - Хорошее расположение, недалеко от метро Апартаменты возможно когда-то раньше соответствовали рейтингу, но сейчас находятся в неухоженном состоянии. Оба кондиционера не работали, на одном вообще сорвана верхняя панель. В ванной комнате стойкий и очень неприятный запах канализации, который невозможно проветрить, сантехника с неисправностями. Кухонная утварь не укомплектована, расходные материалы в количестве 1 шт. Уборка халатная, на мягкой мебели пятна. Кровать очень неудобная. Звукоизоляция слабая, под окнами в узком переулке несколько мусорных баков, которые с жутким грохотом опорожняют мусорщики. Персонал на обращения реагирует формально: пришлите фото, пришлите видео, короче “все должно работать - ты кондиционер включить не можешь”, но проблемы никто решать не собирается - никто так и не появился. Такая же ситуация и с возвратом депозита, его пришлось неоднократно требовать, только жалоба в букинг.ком сработала - вернули на 10-й день. В общем крайне тягостное впечатление. Жаль, что невнимательно читал отрицательные отзывы - в них как раз истинные оценки. Думаю, что положительные пишут те, кого мучают с возвратом депозита, поскольку сразу после выезда получаешь письмо с настоятельной просьбой оценить проживание на 10 :) UPD Добавляю после ответа владельца. 40 лет путешествую, но такое встречаю впервые - чтобы явные проколы оспаривались сервисом. Систему характеризует не ошибка, а реакция на ошибку. Так вот судя по этой реакции эта система принципиально не способна и не собирается оказывать услуги заявленного качества. Я не буду опускаться до спора, пусть это останется на их совести. Я все-таки рекомендую этим "владельцам" все-таки посетить свой объект, где судя по всему они давно не были :)
